mapper.sql: select id, template_code, title, province, city, route_type, days, nights, season_tags, theme_tags, budget_min, budget_max, suitable_for, summary, highlights, daily_plan_json, attraction_codes, transport_suggestion, estimated_cost, status, source, create_time, update_time from northeast_route_template
mapper.insert: insert into northeast_route_template (template_code, title, province, city, route_type, days, nights, season_tags, theme_tags, budget_min, budget_max, suitable_for, summary, highlights, daily_plan_json, attraction_codes, transport_suggestion, estimated_cost, status, source) values (#{templateCode}, #{title}, #{province}, #{city}, #{routeType}, #{days}, #{nights}, #{seasonTags}, #{themeTags}, #{budgetMin}, #{budgetMax}, #{suitableFor}, #{summary}, #{highlights}, #{dailyPlanJson}, #{attractionCodes}, #{transportSuggestion}, #{estimatedCost}, #{status}, #{source})
mapper.delete: delete from northeast_route_template where id in #{id}
